narrative: Draft initiating-coverage analysis of Acme Widgets Inc. (ABCD), as of 2026-07-15. All eight required sections — business model, industry, competitive position, forecast, catalysts, risks, valuation, and thesis — are present and fully cited (evidence coverage 1.0). The forecast models 12% then 10% revenue growth with roughly 200bps of EBIT-margin expansion, consistent on internal recomputation. The draft valuation range is 48.00–52.00 per share (blended midpoint 50.00), triangulated from an intrinsic DCF and a trading-comps cross-check. The proposed rating is Overweight, held as a draft and unapproved. Readiness: Ready for supervisory review. This is a research draft only, not investment advice; no rating or valuation is approved, and supervisory analyst plus research committee sign-off is required before any publication or external delivery.
